intro.title: About RBI Regulations
intro.beforeLsp: QuikkRed is a digital lending platform powered by
intro.afterLsp: (Loan Service Provider). All loans on our platform are disbursed by
intro.afterNbfc: , an RBI-registered NBFC estab  lished in 1996 (CIN: U71290DL1996PTC081328).
intro.content2: The RBI has established comprehensive guidelines to ensure that NBFCs and their digital lending partners maintain financial stability, protect consumer interests, and follow ethical business practices. This page outlines the key RBI regulations applicable to our platform and our lending partner's operations.

partner1.title: Satsai Finlease Private Limited
highlightItems: Satsai Finlease is a registered NBFC under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934.
1996 (28+ years of financial services experience)
satsaifinlease.com
Maintains the minimum Net Owned Fund (NOF) as prescribed by the RBI.
Registration details available for verification on the RBI website.

partner2.title: Fluxusforge Private Limited (LSP)
highlightItems: Loan Service Provider (LSP) and Technology Partner operating the QuikkRed platform.
fluxusforge.in
Provides technology infrastructure, customer onboarding, and servicing support.
Operates under the regulatory framework established by RBI Digital Lending Guidelines, 2022.

subheadings.title: Key Provisions We Follow
highlightItems: All loan amounts are disbursed directly to the borrower's bank account without any pass-through or pool accounts.
All fees, charges, and annual percentage rates (APR) are disclosed upfront before loan sanction.
A standardized KFS is provided to borrowers containing all essential loan information.
Borrowers have the right to exit the loan within a specified look-up period.
Customer data is collected only with explicit consent and used solely for credit assessment and legitimate purposes.

fairPracticeCode.title: Fair Practices Code
fairPracticeCode.introduction: In accordance with RBI Master Direction on Non-Banking Financial Company – Non-Systemically Important Non-Deposit taking Company (Reserve Bank) Directions, 2016, our lending partner Satsai Finlease Private Limited has adopted a comprehensive Fair Practices Code that governs:

customerProtection.title: Customer Protection Framework
customerProtection.subtitle: Your Rights as a Borrower
highlightItems: Complete transparency on loan terms, interest rates, fees, and charges before signing any agreement.
Your personal and financial data is protected and used only for authorized purposes.
Respectful and dignified treatment at all stages of the loan lifecycle.
Access to a robust complaint resolution mechanism.
Option to prepay loans with applicable charges as per the loan agreement.

sections.disclaimer: QuikkRed is a digital lending platform powered by Fluxusforge Private Limited (LSP). All loans are disbursed by Satsai Finlease Private Limited, an RBI-registered NBFC. This page provides a summary of key RBI guidelines applicable to our platform and lending partner's operations. For complete regulatory information, please refer to the official RBI website at www.rbi.org.in. The guidelines mentioned above are subject to updates and amendments by the RBI from time to time.
